title: trifolium fragiferum var. bonannii
intro: Trifolium fragiferum var. bonannii, also known as Bonann's strawberry clover, is a perennial legume plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and astringent, which can help to treat conditions such as urinary tract infections, diarrhea, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Bonann's strawberry clover include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to address a range of health issues.
